summary: Comprehensive testing completed for new earnings endpoints and WebSocket notification system. All 25 tests passed with 100% success rate. Driver earnings reporting and real-time notifications are fully functional.

resolved_issues.resolution: Fixed websockets.connect() timeout parameter for Python compatibility
Added required is_online boolean parameter to toggle request
resolved_issues.impact: Driver online status management now working

passed_tests: GET /api/earnings/summary for all periods (yesterday, this_week, last_week, this_month)
Unauthorized access security (401 responses for all earnings endpoints)
Rider access restriction (403 responses for all earnings endpoints)
Driver Online Toggle with connection manager integration
